admission_process.title: Sri Siddhartha Academy of Higher Education Admission 2025

paragraphs: Sri Siddhartha Academy of Higher Education admission 2025 is open for all the courses. Admission to all the UG, PG and PhD courses is entrance-based. Applicants can apply for the course of their choice online on the university's official website.Sri Siddhartha Academy of Higher Educationoffers many courses under UG, PG, and doctoral levels under various streams, such as Medical, Computer Application, and others. All the information related to the Sri Siddhartha Academy of Higher Education admission 2025 is available in the following segments:

Sri Siddhartha Academy of Higher Education admission to all the courses is entrance-based. The college offers various UG, PG and PhD courses. Candidates seeking admission to Sri Siddhartha Academy of Higher Education to any courses are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria and appear for the selection process accepted by the college. The basic eligibility for UG is to passClass 10 and Class 12from a recognised board and pass UG and PG degrees for admission to PG and PhD courses, respectively. Applicants seeking admission to any courses must appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university. Want to know complete details about the Sri Siddhartha Academy of Higher Education admission process 2025, go through the following section.
Step 1: Application Process

Applicants looking forward to admission to various programmes at Sri Siddhartha Academy of Higher Education must fill up the admission form online by visiting the official website of the college. Application forms cannot be submitted without uploading the required documents.
Step 2: Selection Round

According to the selection criteria, the applicants must have passed Class 12 for admission to UG and a graduation degree for admission to PG. Additionally, for all the courses, applicants must appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university and score well. The university releases the shortlisted candidates’ list for all the courses based on their scores in entrance exams.
Step 3: Final Seat Confirmation
Sri Siddhartha Academy of Higher Education will release a merit list of the selected applicants for all courses for the final seat allotment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sri Siddhartha Medical College - Sri Siddhartha Academy of Higher EducationReviewed on 3 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a nice place to graduate from.
reviews.review_text: I am not a hostelite. The food is average, as told by my friends. It only has vegetarian options. There is a big ground to play basketball, throwball, football, cricket, a swimming pool, and a badminton court within a 1 KM radius. The place has been renovated and looks really nice.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by SSIT - Sri Siddhartha Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 28 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Our college has a big campus with a beautiful library, etc., suggest choosing our college.
reviews.review_text: According to us, paying the amount to this college is good. Facilities are very good like hostel for girls and boys, sports, especially health center, Canara Bank, etc. Hostel offers essential infrastructure and facilitates to ensure a comfortable stay for us.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by SSIT - Sri Siddhartha Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 26 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A student's perspective: Balancing infrastructure and placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The main thing is that our college has the second-largest global library in the world, and it is facilitated by the digital library. A Xerox center, canteens, cafes, library, syndicate bank, gym, IGNOU labs, a huge playground, etc., are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Sri Siddhartha Medical College - Sri Siddhartha Academy of Higher EducationReviewed on 26 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I'm not saying it's the best, but it's better.
reviews.review_text: The food is good, but don't expect it to be the best like your home. There are a lot of medical facilities here. Doctors are good at teaching you. They are friendly, not too egocentric. Free Wi-Fi is available in the library and the OPD building for doctors, working staff, and students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sri Siddhartha Medical College - Sri Siddhartha Academy of Higher EducationReviewed on 26 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college has amazing infrastructure and great academics.
reviews.review_text: The college has one of the best infrastructures, it's built on 250 acres of land and has everything. It has a huge ground, a library, so many hostels, and a building for each department. The classrooms are pretty huge, and there's greenery all over the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by SSIT - Sri Siddhartha Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 19 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has a good library and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good library. It is famous for being the world's best library which is the shape of a globe with more than lakh books. The college has a good Wi-Fi connection for 24 hours. Classrooms are very good and good food is also available in the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by SSIT - Sri Siddhartha Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 7 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfaction with the faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi in our college is so good, and we can easily use it. Labs are excellent, and teachers teach us very well. Our library is mesmerizing and good. Our hostel provides good facilities, and the hostel warden offers food and other facilities like coffee, medical services, sports, and games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by SSIT - Sri Siddhartha Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 5 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I highly recommend that you join this college. I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are comfortable and have good ventilation which is helpful for students' concentration in classes. There is Wi-Fi in every department, which can be used by students, and labs are well maintained by the individual departments. Our college library is said to be Asia's second-largest library, with great interior design and infrastructure. The hostel rooms and food are also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by SSIT - Sri Siddhartha Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 4 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty, environment, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Sri Siddhartha Institute of Technology (SSIT) Campus is spread over 65 acres of land with modern labs, a geodesic dome library, hostels, sports facilities, a gym, a cafeteria, and banking services. It provides a well-equipped campus for academic and extracurricular excellence.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sri Siddhartha Medical College - Sri Siddhartha Academy of Higher EducationReviewed on 2 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Siddhartha Medical College - Sri Siddhartha Academy of Higher Education.
reviews.review_text: We have a pretty scenery and view as we enter the campus. The hostels have a gym which is also well functioning. The library is also well-maintained. We have a campus ground that has a very nice basketball court and an area to play volleyball and throw the ball. There is free Wi-Fi in different areas of our campus. Hostels are also now well maintained and complaints are resolved within a few minutes. (depending on severity)

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by SSIT - Sri Siddhartha Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 17 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Better but not best. I will place this college in top 20 in Karnataka.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is above average. The library is world's 2nd most beautiful library, according to the records. This college has 3 main buildings and 1 library which has wonderful environment. The hostel has 3 blocks named as something.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by SSIT - Sri Siddhartha Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 4 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Inside story of Sri Siddhartha Institute Of Technology .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college is famous for it's Library infrastructure and it has a good campus as well as a greenish campus with multiple numbers of trees. Our college has 4 main park where students spend a good time with friends and it has a good canteen and cafeteria where food is also good. Our college has 2 boys hostels and 1 girls hostel. The hostel ambiance is good, and it has good food meals also.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by SSIT - Sri Siddhartha Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 1 Jun 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Best college with good placement facilities available.
reviews.review_text: The college has a well designed infrastructure  with some excellent facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, library, etc. Even the hostel facilities are good and they provide food in a clean and hygienic mess. Medical facilities are available in our college. Many sports and games events are conducted every semester.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by SSIT - Sri Siddhartha Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 31 May 2024)
reviews.review_text: The college's architecture is very good. There is greenery all around the college. Infrastructure-wise it is far better college. Wi-Fi is available in college campuses. The classrooms and labs are also good. The main highlight of this college is its library which is very good. Since I am not a hostelite, I can't give any comment on the hostel. The sports facilities are also good .

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by SSIT - Sri Siddhartha Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 29 Feb 2024)
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure are awesome for my course. In every building, Wi-Fi is available, and there are more labs for expecting the program. The library is very beautiful because it is the tops. The quality of food is also good. In every two days, boiled egg is provided.

paragraphs: AIHM admission 2025is entrance-based.AIHMconducts its own entrance exam "AIHM Entrance Test" for those applicants who have not taken any competitive examination. To get admission at AIHM candidate should secure a Valid score from any one of the following management entrance tests (CAT/XAT/ATMA/MAT/CMAT). AIHM offers two years full-time program of PGP with a variety of specialisation courses like Marketing & Sales Management, Financial and Hospitality Management.

Candidates interested in getting into AIHM are required to follow the entrance exam and AIHM application process. The Pre-Entry Qualification for the PGP Program is graduation in any discipline from a University recognized by UGC with a minimum of 55% marks. The selection process for admission to the program is as under:
AIHM course admissions 2025 for all of its courses are done based on entrance exams. Check below the complete AIHM admission process:Step 1 - Application Process:
The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form by visiting the official website of the Ahmedabad Institute of Hospitality Management.
Step 2 - Selection rounds:

Candidate should get a valid score from any one of the following management admission tests (CAT/XAT/ATMA/MAT/CMAT). Candidates can appear for the AIHM Entrance Test for those applicants who have not taken any competitive examination. Candidates have to appear for Personal Interview, Group Discussions and any other process of selection as decided by the Admission Committee.
Step 3 - Admission confirmation:

Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Based on academic performance, scores in the entrance tests, performance in the selection process and other co-curricular activities, the admission committee will prepare a composite score for the candidate who will be granted admission.
